sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: SOUTHERN COPPER CORP/의 공시 핵심을 한국어로 요약했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 4분기 순매출이 38억 6,980만 달러로 전년 동기 대비 39.0% 증가한 분기 최대를 기록했습니다.
4분기 순이익은 13억 790만 달러로 64.7% 늘었고 2025년 연간 순이익은 43억 3,490만 달러로 사상 최대를 기록했습니다.
연간 순매출은 134억 2,000만 달러였고 연간 영업활동 현금흐름은 47억 5,210만 달러로 7.5% 증가했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 토케팔라(+46.6%) 증산에 힘입어 4분기 구리 생산이 전분기 대비 1.4% 늘었고 은(+15.3%)·아연(+7.1%) 생산도 증가했습니다.

watchItems.text: 구리 가격 강세와 생산량 증가가 사상 최대 실적을 이끈 만큼 가격 사이클의 지속 여부가 관전 포인트입니다.
연간 기록적 순이익과 현금흐름이 향후 자본투자·배당 정책에 어떻게 반영되는지 주목할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 scco-20260127xex99d1.htm EX-99.1 ​ Exhibit 99.1 ​ ​ Investor Relations: ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ Raul Jacob Victor Pedraglio Bertin Galarreta +(602) 264-1375 southerncopper@southernperu.com.pe www.southerncoppercorp.com ​ January 27, 2025 Southern Copper Corporation (NYSE and BVL: SCCO) ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ● 4Q25 net sales were $3,869.8 million, which represented a 39.0% increase with regard to 4Q24´s figure and a new quarterly record. Growth was primarily fueled by higher sales volumes for copper (+2.8%), molybdenum (+9.6%), zinc (+20.7%) and silver (+11.3%), and by better prices for all our main products. 2025 Net sales hit a record high of $13,420.0 million, topping 2024’s net sales by $1,986.6 million or 17.4%. This expansion  Normalized numeric aliases: $3,869.8 million = 38억 6,980만 달러; $13,420.0 million = 134억 2,000만 달러; $1,986.6 million = 19억 8,660만 달러; $3,869.8 = 3,869.8달러; $1,986.6 = 1,986.6달러; 3,869 million = 38억 6,900만 달러; 13,420 million = 134억 2,000만 달러; 1,986 million = 19억 8,600만 달러.

(+3.2%) and silver (+41.6%). Growth in volumes and prices was slightly offset by a minor decrease in sales volumes for copper (-0.1%). ● Net income in 4Q25 was $1,307.9 million, which represented a 64.7% increase with regard to the $793.9 million registered in 4Q24. The net income margin in 4Q25 was 33.8%, versus 28.5% in 4Q24. 2025 net income hit a record high of $4,334.9 million, 28.4% above the figure in 2024. These improvements were driven by an increase in net sales and by our strict cost control measures. The net income margin   Normalized numeric aliases: $1,307.9 million = 13억 790만 달러; $793.9 million = 7억 9,390만 달러; $4,334.9 million = 43억 3,490만 달러; $2,310.5 million = 23억 1,050만 달러; $1,506.7 million = 15억 670만 달러; $7,822.4 million = 78억 2,240만 달러; $1,307.9 = 1,307.9달러; $793.9 = 793.9달러; $2,310.5 = 2,310.5달러; 2,310 million = 23억 1,000만 달러; $7,822.4 = 7,822.4달러; 1,307 million = 13억 700만 달러; 4,334 million = 43억 3,400만 달러; 1,506 million = 15억 600만 달러; 7,822 million = 78억 2,200만 달러.

n 2024. The adjusted EBITDA margin in 2025 was 58.3% versus 56.0% in 2024. ● Cash flow from operating activities in 2025 was $4,752.1 million, which represented an increase of 7.5% over the $4,421.7 million posted in 2024. This result, which was mainly fueled by higher net income, was partially offset by an increase in net operating assets. ● Copper production registered an increase of 1.4% in 4Q25 in quarter-on-quarter terms. This outcome was primarily driven by higher production at our La Caridad (+11.3%), Toquepala (+5.7%), Cuajone (+1.1%) and IMMSA (+2.7%) mines, attributable to better ore grades and recoveries. These positive results, however, were partially offset by a decrease in production at our Buenavista (-3.5%) mine. 2025 Copper production  Normalized numeric aliases: $4,752.1 million = 47억 5,210만 달러; $4,421.7 million = 44억 2,170만 달러; $4,752.1 = 4,752.1달러; $4,421.7 = 4,421.7달러; 4,752 million = 47억 5,200만 달러; 4,421 million = 44억 2,100만 달러; 954,270 million = 9,542억 7,000만 달러.

4Q25 compared to 4Q24, which was primarily attributable to higher production at the Toquepala (+46.6%) and Cuajone (+1.4%) mines. Mined silver production rose 15.3% in 4Q25, driven primarily by a rise in production at all our mines. Mined zinc production increased 7.1% this quarter, mainly due to higher production at the Buenavista Zinc concentrator (+14.9%). ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ FOURTH QUARTER AND YEAR 2025 RESULTS SOUTHERN COPPER ​ ​ ​ ​ Yearly by-product production : Molybdenum production was 31,153 tons in 2025, which was 7.4% above the figure in 2024. This increase was mainly due to higher production at our Toquepala (+18.2%) and La Caridad (+7.4%) mines. Mined zinc production rose 36.1% YoY, after 52,472 additional tons were produced at the Buenavista zinc concentrator. Mined silver production increased 15.3% in 2025, primarily driven by higher production at all our mines. ● 4Q25 operating ca  Normalized numeric aliases: 31,153 million = 311억 5,300만 달러; 52,472 million = 524억 7,200만 달러.
